---
name: Requirement
about: Describe a new requirement or user story
labels: 'requirement'
---

### Summary
Short summary of the requirement.

### Business need
Why is this needed?

### Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

### Stakeholders
- Product: @product-owner
- Tech: @team

### Collaboration & Approval
- Author: @author (the engineer who implements the change)
- Reviewer(s): @reviewer (team members who must review the PR)
- Approver(s): @approver (team lead or designated approver who can merge the PR)
- Acceptance owner: @acceptance-owner (person responsible for final verification and sign-off)

Approval process:
1. Create an issue using this template to capture requirements.
2. Assign Product (owner) and Acceptance owner.
3. After implementation, open a PR linking the requirement issue.
4. Request reviews from Reviewer(s). Reviewers must approve.
5. Approver(s) perform final review and merge when all checks pass.
6. Acceptance owner performs manual verification (if applicable) and marks the requirement as accepted.

### Notes
Attach designs, mockups or links to external docs.
